english_news.title: Trump administration: Iran deal signing likely in coming days, but not '100%' certain
english_news.summary: A deal to end the Iran war could be signed soon, a senior Trump administration official said, following recent conflicting statements from the warring nations.

english_news.title: Paramount-WBD merger wins approval from DOJ
english_news.summary: The DOJ approval is an important milestone for the roughly $110 billion deal, though it could still face legal challenges from state attorneys general.

english_news.title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX begins trading on the Nasdaq
english_news.summary: Elon Musk's stake in SpaceX is worth more than $766 billion. Combined with his Tesla holdings, Musk's net worth as of Friday is roughly $1.05 trillion.

english_news.title: SpaceX market cap tops $2 trillion after shares of Elon Musk's rocket company gain 19% on debut
english_news.summary: SpaceX shares soared on Friday as trading commenced on the Nasdaq.

english_news.title: Top House Republican’s family investment poised to benefit from SpaceX IPO
english_news.summary: Republican Rep. Lisa McClain’s husband bought up to $250,000 in Elon Musk’s xAI before it was folded into SpaceX ahead of its IPO.

english_news.title: Call Kevin Warsh the Fed 'chairman'
english_news.summary: Kevin Warsh's two immediate predecessors preferred to be called the Fed "chair." For Warsh, it's "chairman" of the Federal Reserve.

english_news.title: As investors flock to SpaceX, one trader eyes a sleepy 'stealth' play
english_news.summary: If you're looking for something a little more terrestrial, there's one stock that investors are overlooking.

english_news.title: Small investors scrambled to get in on the SpaceX IPO, even as some believe the valuation is 'stupid'
english_news.summary: SpaceX set a fixed price of $135 per share in the leadup to its IPO on Friday, placing its valuation at $1.77 trillion. Shares rallied more than 25%.

english_news.title: Deal to end fighting would lead to Hormuz reopening, Iran says
english_news.summary: The deal which will pave the way for hostilities to end is close to being finalised, the US, Iran and mediators Pakistan say.

english_news.title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX soars in stock market debut
english_news.summary: Musk is now worth $1.11tn according to the Bloomberg rich list, while SpaceX listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange with a value of $2.2tn.

english_news.title: French town buries murdered child as questions mount over police failings
english_news.summary: The prime suspect in the killing of Lyhanna, 11, was reported to police nine months prior but never questioned.

english_news.title: Discovery of €1.2m jewellery prompts fresh probe into former Spanish PM
english_news.summary: José Luis Rodriguez Zapatero is suspected of being unable to show proof he paid import duties on the jewellery.

english_news.title: Fans on concourses instead of in seats, claims Fifa
english_news.summary: Fifa says numerous empty seats were visible in the near-sell-out Group A match between South Korea and the Czech Republic because of fans remaining on concourses.

english_news.title: Taylor Swift makes tearful 21-minute speech as she joins Songwriters Hall of Fame
english_news.summary: The singer thanks her family as she becomes the youngest woman to be inducted into the Hall of Fame.

english_news.title: Thai Princess Bajrakitiyabha dies after more than three years in coma
english_news.summary: Princess Bajrakitiyabha, the king's eldest daughter, collapsed in December 2022 while exercising her dogs.

english_news.title: More time needed for deadly Air India crash inquiry, officials say
english_news.summary: A statement says "significant progress" has been made into investigating the crash, in which 260 people died a year ago.

OpenAI CEO奥特曼推迟访韩计划

据报道，OpenAI首席执行官山姆·奥特曼因个人原因推迟访韩计划。奥特曼原定于14日至15日访韩，会见三星电子、Kakao、NAVER等企业负责人。

chinese_news.title: 神秘失窃案背后，比亚迪如何“驯服”泰国工厂？｜深氪lite
chinese_news.summary:
比亚迪泰国罗勇工厂，曾接连陷入神秘“失窃案”。然而盘点下来，钢材螺栓数目齐全，劳保用品甚至都没有异常消耗。

实际上，被盗的并非值钱物件，而是车间水房里，桶装水塑料标签上的“BYD”Logo（品牌符号）。

那些本应随意摆放的桶装水，总会被转成同一个角度。桶身上原本完整的BYD字样齐齐消失，只留下一道被小刀精心裁剪过的轮廓痕迹。

李有才是首批加入比亚迪罗勇项目的员工之一，他告诉36氪，直到一次受邀参加当地泰籍员工间的聚会，他才找到这些被“偷走”的BYD Logo。

“有一个当地人穿了一件T恤，那不是我们的工服，但胸前却有一个BYD的Logo，我凑近了看才发现，那就是桶装水上的Logo塑料片，他们用胶水小心地粘在衣服上”，在李有才的询问下，当地人纷纷向他展示自己的贴有BYD Logo的“周边”，有帽子、鞋子，甚至是菲亚特汽车上。

中国工业品牌第一次在海外变成了"想要贴在身上的符号"。

“他们就想让别人知道自己在比亚迪工作”，李有才告诉36氪，“比

chinese_news.title: 顶流偶像“空空”匿名作序的《浮生别院》，究竟有何魔力？
chinese_news.summary:
2017年，周志峰卖掉北京的一处房产，把它换成了菜市口附近的一处院子。

院子不到180平米。但在设计师的巧思下，它被切分成茶室、餐厅、厨房、小花园和主卧等多个独立又连通的空间，曲径通幽。盛夏时，旁边一棵活了一百二十年的国槐展露出枝繁叶茂，几乎将小院的大部分笼罩在它的“势力”之下。

国槐另一边，一街之隔，是有1300年历史的法源寺——法源寺的丁香四月初开，满寺如雪。而“居于庙前、庙左”成为周志峰买下院子最主要的理由。

来源：崛貌国际艺术设计

他

chinese_news.title: 36氪研究院 | 2026年中国工业用品制造与流通报告
chinese_news.summary:
当前，中国制造业正进入以智能化、绿色化、融合化为主要特征的高质量发展新阶段。随着市场需求日趋多元、产品迭代加快、交付要求提升，叠加成本与合规压力的多重约束，传统“大而全”的内部一体化模式边际效率递减，制造企业愈发聚焦研发、制造、工艺等核心能力，并将采购、仓配和供应链协同等非核心职能加速向外部专业服务体系转移，推动生产性服务业深度嵌入制造业运行体系。作为制造企业日常运营中高频、分散、复杂的基础物料，工业用品尤其是MRO物料，直接关系设备维护、产线运行、安全生产和综合运营效率。然而，长期以来，工业用品采购普遍存在供应商分散、商品参数不统一、选型比价困难、履约稳定性不足、库存管理粗放等问题，成为制造业降本增效和供应链数字化升级中的重要痛点。在此背景下，工业用品数字化平台从传统交易渠道中分化出来，通过数字技术系统性整合与重构碎片化的服务资源，逐步升级为支撑制造业运行的重要基础设施。

工业用品B2B行业正从交易数字化迈向供应链协同，MRO成为价值释放的核心切口

在制造业升级、设备更新与物流降本等多重因素驱动下，工业用

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 前瓦锡兰老兵创业，为船舶装上中国“心脏”，半年超 5000万订单
chinese_news.summary:
作者丨欧雪

编辑丨袁斯来

硬氪获悉，连云港力普司船舶科技有限公司（下称“力普司LiiPuS”）近期连续完成种子轮及天使轮融资，总额达数千万元。其中，种子轮由江苏金桥基金独家投资，天使轮由云时资本独家投资。本轮资金将主要用于高端船舶综合电力推进系统及产品的样机测试、持续改进及小批量交付，加速国产高端推进系统在港口拖轮、海工船、豪华游艇等场景的规模化应用。

力普司2025年7月成立于连云港，聚焦大型船舶综合电力推进系统的研发、设计与生产，产品覆盖领先一代的L型永磁全回转推进器、永磁吊舱推进器、破冰型全回转推进器等全矩阵系列，全系列产品采用标准化、模块化的设计和制造理念，具有尺寸小、重量轻、功率密度大、可靠性高等优点。

公司创始人李祥彪曾先后任职于苏船、南高精、瓦锡兰及斯凯孚，推进器经验近20年，熟悉国内外同类产品的技术路线、制造工艺、质量水平等，深知国内用户痛点，中国产品与欧洲产品仍有不小的质量差距，力普司有望解决行业痛点，缩小与国际品牌之间的差距。

硬氪了解到，永磁推进器因结构紧凑、效率高、操

chinese_news.title: 8点1氪丨SpaceX上市在即，马斯克或成全球首位万亿富翁；92年技术极客陈宇森接任钉钉CEO；比尔·盖茨就爱泼斯坦案出席国会听证

今日热点导览

  • OpenAI正考虑大幅下调产品价格，预判将与Anthropic展开用户之争
  • 全球两大预测平台世界杯冠军合约成交额破20亿美元，有望刷新单项纪录
  • SK海力士设备供应商要求涨价
  • 端午前机票价格跳水
  • SpaceX上市前夕，美股太空股提前狂欢

TOP 3 大新闻

SpaceX上市在即，马斯克或成全球首位万亿富翁

据报道，SpaceX将于美东时间6月12日在纳斯达克挂牌交易，股票代码SPCX。根据SpaceX 6月11日在官网发布的声明，公司此次IPO发行5.556亿股，发行价为每股135美元，募资总额达750亿美元。SpaceX此次IPO募资规模是沙特阿美2019年创下的294亿美元上市纪录的逾两倍。声明显示，SpaceX还授予承销银行超额配售权，可按发行价额外购买8330万股股票。若该权利全部行使，IPO融资规模将增至约860亿美

克里斯蒂安·斯坦出任雷诺集团西班牙首席执行官

7月1日起，克里斯蒂安·斯坦（Christian Stein）将接替何塞·马雷亚·里卡森（Josep María Recasens）, 出任雷诺集团西班牙新任首席执行官。何塞·马雷亚·里卡森将离开雷诺集团，寻求新的职业发展。克里斯蒂安·斯坦将在担任该新职务的同时，继续兼任雷诺集团首席传播官，并向雷诺集团首席执行官福兰（François Provost）汇报。

通用或停止将磷酸铁锂电池用于电动汽

chinese_news.title: ChinaJoy最硬核的区域，36氪与你共同探索 | Vision Future前沿科技展区 × 36氪直播间开启预约
chinese_news.summary:
两个月后，ChinaJoy即将在上海浦东举办，这里又会挤满全国最爱玩、最关注前沿科技的年轻人。

作为国内延续二十年的数字娱乐展会，ChinaJoy早已不只是玩家试玩新游戏的狂欢，它已经变成整个科技+数字娱乐行业一年一度的线下交汇点——这里有最新的产品、最先锋的趋势，更聚集了一群想改变行业的年轻人和创业者，在这里你能摸到这个行业最真实的脉搏。

作为ChinaJoy Vision Future 前沿科技展区的战略合作伙伴，以及ChinaJoy AI未来生态大会的战略合作伙伴，36氪游戏与ChinaJoy 联合打造「ChinaJoy Vision Future 前沿科技展区 × 36氪直播间」，将一线报道的质感和信息密度直接带给观众。

过去三年，科技对数字娱乐的改造速度超过了所有人的预期，AI从实验室概念变成了行业标配的生产工具，具身智能、新一代消费电子不断打开新的想象空间，整个赛道每天都有新公司、新产品、新模式冒出来，很多变化都发生在一线，只看线上通稿你根本摸不到

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $70,000 by end of June 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: BTC at $64K amid SpaceX IPO euphoria and Standard Chartered 'crypto winter bottom' call; institutional inflows via ETFs creating support floor.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk (Bitcoin $59–64K range); Bloomberg ETF analyst notes persistent flows despite volatility

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Iran–US deal be signed and announced before June 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Trump admin official said 'likely in coming days' but not '100% certain'; deal would reopen Hormuz, massively move oil/equities.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC Top News (May 5, 2026); BBC World confirms US, Iran, Pakistan mediators say deal 'close to finalised'

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Paramount–WBD merger close by December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: DOJ approval milestone achieved; ~$110B deal still faces state AG challenges, but green light from Justice is major catalyst.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC Top News (DOJ approval); merger size and scope make it high-volume prediction market bet

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will SpaceX maintain a market cap above $2 trillion through Q2 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: SpaceX IPO priced at $1.77T, rallied >25% to $2.2T in debut; valuation debate ('stupid' per some traders) creates vol and conviction bets.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC, BBC World (SpaceX Nasdaq debut, May 5, 2026); CoinDesk notes 20% pop and tokenization boom narrative

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Kevin Warsh's Fed maintain a 'higher for longer' rate stance through September 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Warsh takes helm as Fed chair; his terminology choice ('chairman' not 'chair') signals hawkish persona; macro traders need rate path clarity.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Warsh Fed appointment terminology); macro context around inflation and crypto regulatory backdrop

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Bitcoin's 7-day realized volatility exceed 3.5% on any single day between now and August 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinMetrics or Glassnode 7-day rolling realized volatility feed
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Iran deal announcement or geopolitical shock could spike vol instantly; current $64K price action leaves tail-risk unpriced.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Hormuz reopening deal, oil shock, or sudden macro pivot by Warsh Fed

market_questions_to_create.question: Will OpenAI's announced product pricing be lower than Anthropic's by July 15, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Official OpenAI pricing page & Anthropic pricing page (Claude API, products)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: 36Kr reports OpenAI considering 'drastic price cuts' to compete for users; Anthropic hasn't matched; this race will dictate LLM margin wars.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: 36Kr (May 5, 2026) exclusive: OpenAI deliberating major price reductions; no English media coverage yet

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Elon Musk's net worth exceed $1.2 trillion before year-end 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Bloomberg Billionaires Index or Forbes Real Time Net Worth
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Currently ~$1.05–1.11T post-SpaceX IPO; further Tesla or SpaceX rallies plausible given tech/space momentum.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: SpaceX IPO surge +20–25%; Tesla momentum unbroken; trillionaire narrative captures retail/macro attention

market_questions_to_create.question: Will a major AI biotech stock (CRSP, EDIT, BEAM, or equivalent) outperform SPY by >15% between now and December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Yahoo Finance or Bloomberg relative performance (stock return minus SPY return)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Hacker News CRISPR breakthrough (cancer selectivity) and $2B US quantum computing push suggest biotech/AI convergence tailwind; underweighted in macro narratives.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: HN top story (CRISPR selectivity for undruggable cancers); US defense quantum bet; not yet in equity flows

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Ethereum's ETH/BTC ratio exceed 0.06 by September 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko or Bloomberg spot ETH/BTC pair
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: XRP sentiment at 8-month low (buy signal per CoinDesk); altseason narratives (tokenization, SpaceX catalysts) could rotate capital; ETH has structural staking yield edge.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk: XRP 8-month sentiment low; Cointelegraph: 'tokenization boom' theme; SpaceX IPO as proof-of-concept for mega-cap private issuance

investment_theses.thesis: BTC outperforms amid Iran deal resolution (Hormuz reopening) and geopolitical stability narrative, driven by macro safe-haven bid + oil price decline boosting real yields.
supporting_signals: Trump admin: Iran deal 'likely in coming days' (CNBC, May 5)
BBC: Hormuz reopening tied to deal finalization; BBC/UK media rarely frontrun US on Iran
Standard Chartered analyst: BTC hit bottom at $59K, marking end of crypto winter (CoinDesk)
Bitcoin at $64K suggests ~$70K breakout room if geopolitical de-escalates
investment_theses.counter_view: Deal falls apart, Iran-US tensions spike, oil rallies, real yields compress, BTC corrects toward $58–60K as liquidity dries.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC spot or 3M BTC perps; pair trade BTC/oil (long BTC, short crude); or BTC call options (strike $70K, exp. Aug 2026)

investment_theses.thesis: SpaceX tokenization and mega-cap private issuance trend (now proven viable) attracts institutional capital away from traditional equities; altcoin rally underway as L1/L2 infrastructure benefits.
supporting_signals: 36Kr: SpaceX IPO historic scale ($750B raise); crypto-native traders rotating into asset tokenization thesis
CoinDesk: Kalshi crypto perpetuals growing; institutional interest in on-chain settlement infrastructure
XRP sentiment at 8-month low = contrarian buy signal (CoinDesk); Pudgy Penguins, Plasma, Velvet trending on-chain
investment_theses.counter_view: SpaceX valuation already priced in ($2.2T); tokenization meme fades; Paramount-WBD merger or other mega-cap M&A siphons crypto liquidity back to TradFi equities.
investment_theses.expression: Long ETH/BTC ratio via perps or spot pair; long Solana (SOL) or Polygon (MATIC) as tokenization infrastructure beneficiaries; or BTC/SPY ratio to isolate crypto alpha

investment_theses.thesis: Fed chair Warsh's hawkish 'chairman' persona maintains higher-for-longer rate expectations; this crushes rate-sensitive mega-cap growth (Tesla, Nvidia) while benefiting USD and short-duration bonds.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Warsh prefers 'chairman' over 'chair'—signals tougher stance than predecessors
Kevin Warsh historical record: Fed hawk on inflation; appointed by Trump
Crypto funding cost compression observed; stablecoin yields (USDC) rising on 'higher for longer' expectations
SK Hynix supply chain cost pressures (36Kr) = margin compression narrative supports high rates
investment_theses.counter_view: Inflation rolls over faster than expected; Warsh pivots dovish by Q3 2026; Fed cuts rates, triggering tech rally and BTC breakout.
investment_theses.expression: Short TSLA or NVDA vs. long SPY (TLT or long-duration Treasury exposure); or long DXY (US dollar strength) vs. short BTC; pair: long TLT, short TSLA

investment_theses.thesis: Paramount-WBD merger completion de-risks media conglomerate consolidation narrative; streaming wars end in oligopoly, freeing up capital for tech/AI mega-cap buys or M&A in AI/biotech.
supporting_signals: CNBC: DOJ approval milestone achieved; state AG challenges are legal noise, not deal-breakers (historical precedent)
Merger size $110B positions combined entity as equal to Disney/Netflix; removes tail risk from streaming capex wars
Capital redeployment expected into AI (OpenAI, Anthropic), quantum (US $2B bet, CoinDesk), and biotech (CRISPR advances, HN trending)
investment_theses.counter_view: State AGs succeed in blocking deal; protracted litigation extends to 2027; media stocks crater; capital stays trapped.
investment_theses.expression: Long Paramount Global (PARA) or WBD calls (60–90 day expiry); or long Media & Entertainment ETF (VGT sector component) relative to QQQ

investment_theses.thesis: AI biotech convergence (CRISPR selectivity, generative drug discovery) underpriced; US $2B quantum defense push catalyzes biopharma hardware demand; small-cap CRISPR and AI gene editing stocks outperform SPY by 15%+ through end-2026.
supporting_signals: HN: CRISPR tech selectively shreds cancer cells, including 'undruggable' cancers (top story, 586 upvotes; 154 comments = high signal-to-noise)
